column:name: # ^ Schema overlay on core Spell.tsv. Core declares
# ^ `cooldown:float:5.0`, so spells that leave the cell empty default to 5.0s.
# ^ This balance mod lowers the global default to 3.0s by overriding the column
# ^ default — without editing Spell.tsv. Only spells whose cooldown cell is empty
# ^ are affected (those that set an explicit cooldown keep it); the override only
# ^ changes the value used for empty cells.
